title: Wine Tasting Evening
description: Join us for an exclusive wine tasting event featuring premium selections from Napa Valley. Includes cheese pairing and expert sommelier guidance.

title: Chef's Table Experience
description: An intimate 6-course tasting menu prepared right before your eyes by our executive chef. Limited to 8 guests.

title: Jazz Night
description: Enjoy live jazz music while dining. Special cocktail menu available.

title: Cooking Masterclass
description: Learn to prepare signature dishes from our kitchen. Includes lunch and recipe booklet.

title: Summer BBQ Party
description: Annual outdoor BBQ featuring grilled specialties, craft beers, and live music.
